Built the full command center system, agent context, one-pager, and North Star document in one session. The vision is no longer vague — it has a name, a direction, and a next meeting on May 5th.

growth_log.entry: Full pre-PR logistics identified: sell camper OR offer to uncle (he may drive to pick it up), transfer camper title into Deryl name first. Pack car, drive to Arizona, leave car with family. Store extra stuff — possibly at moms. Get motorcycle license (permit first since old one expired). All of this needs to happen before Puerto Rico trial week.
growth_log.title: Puerto Rico Prep — Logistics Brain Dump
growth_log.action_items: Transfer camper title | Offer camper to uncle | Sell or dispose of camper | Pack car | Drive to AZ | Leave car with family | Store stuff at moms | Get motorcycle permit | Get motorcycle license

growth_log.text: The speaker vision crystallized. Build a life worth coming back from — then go back and give it. Marshfield is where I serve, not where I settle. The distinction changes the whole mission.
Ken conversation went well. He was moved by the alignment presentation. Trial week in Puerto Rico proposed. May 5th follow-up set. $5K/month ask locked. One-pager built.
Fear of the unknown is real — but the alignment between me, Ken, Growth House, and the concierge vision is too strong to ignore. The word that kept coming up: refreshing. That's the body saying yes.

Environment at Buddy's: drama, complaining, Oscar scatterbrained. Key 13 Shadow (Discord) activated. Reframe: this is the systems void that makes me indispensable. Fill gaps without martyrdom. Stack cash. Get out with integrity.
Walk into the Ken conversation as a builder meeting a builder — not an applicant. He approached. That changes the energy of everything.
